Petition For Order Releasing Co-Trustees From Continued Bond Requirement And Releasing Surety From Liability On Bond
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Kyrill Dmitrieff and Oleg Pafnutieff (Co-Trustees).

Ms. Calhoun stated that the Trust is partially distributed, that the Parties have been traveling, that there are waivers of account on file and that the Trust is not under Court supervision. The Court granted the petition for order releasing Co-Trustees from continued bond requirement, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Authorizing Payment Of Fees To Guardian Ad Litem.
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property Of Testamentary Trust And To Enter Into Exclusive Right To Sell Agreement With Broker
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-12-296287 In Re: Durable Power of Attorney for Andrie Bowsunowsky.

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Kyrill Dmitrieff and Oleg Pafnutieff. Svetlana Shirinova for and with Natalya Vtyurina. Caroline Hinsahw Guardian Ad Litem for Andrei Bowsunowsky.

Ms. Hinshaw stated that $20,000.00 earned from sale of the property was going to be placed in the Special Needs Trust and at least another $18,000.00 to $22,000.00 for rents as well. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Petition for Approval of Settlement was granted (subject to review of the revised order which includes language regarding how rents are to be paid). The Petition to Compel Co-Trustees to Account was taken off calendar as the petition is being filed in the Buida Trust while asking for relief in the Bowsunowsky Trust. The Petition for Authority to Sell Real Property. etc. was taken under submission pending signing of the order approving the settlement agreement. The Petition for Order Confirming Invalidity of Power Attorney, etc. was continued to February 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (upon signing of the order approving the settlement, Ms. Calhoun will withdraw said petition).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Order Approving Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Compel Co-Trustees To Account
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Co-Trustees To Account
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Jan-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property Of Testamentary Trust And To Enter Into Exclusive Right To Sell Agreement With Broker
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Continued To Jan-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Archbishop Kyrill Dmitrieff. Svetlana Shirinova for Natalia Vtyurina (Power of Attorney/Agent). Caroline Hinshaw Guardian Ad Litem for Andrei Bowsunowski.

Ms. Calhoun clarified that the accounting that was filed was for the Bowsunowski Trust not the Buida Trust, and that it should have it's own case number. Ms. Calhoun also advised the Court that the Civil department decided that the life estate issue raised in the eviction matter (641552) needs to be decided in the Probate department and that the demurrer was sustained without leave to amend this morning. In addition, Ms. Calhoun stated that a Petition for Order Confirming Invalidity of Power of Attorney, etc. in case number 296287 has a hearing date of January 7, 2013. Ms. Shirinova stated that she will be asking that the Buida Trust and the Bowsunowski Trust be consolidated and expressed the POA's concern with regard to how the $350,000.00 was spent. The Petition for Authority to Sell Real Property, etc. was continued to January 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition to Compel Co-Trustees to Account was also continued from January 16, 2013 to January 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Durable Power of Attorney matter case number 296287 on calendar for January 7, 2013 was also continued to January 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property Of Testamentary Trust And To Enter Into Exclusive Right To Sell Agreement With Broker
Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Continued To Oct-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Kyrill Dmitrieff. Svetlana Shirinova for Andre Bowsunowsky. Natalia Vtyurina also present.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to notice, the issue of Ms. Vtyurina having/not having standing, validity of the Power of Attorney held by Ms. Vtyurina, whether an accounting should be required or waived, whether or not Mr. Bowsunowsky has a life estate now that he is no longer residing in the premises, filing of a Petition for Appointment of a Temporary Conservator (Nuetral Party v Ms. Vtyurina) in San Mateo County, Ms. Vtyurina living in the premises rent free, etc. An evidentiary hearing on the Power of Attorney and a hearing on standing was set for September 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Authority to Sell Real Property, etc. was continued to October 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Designation Of Successor Trustee (Probate Code 15,600) And For Order Authorizing Powers
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Continued To Jun-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Henry Glasser for Kyrill Dmitrieff (Petitioner).

Mr. Glasser stated that the Trustee of the remainder was no longer able to maintain the property, and that he wanted to subtitute Oleg Pafnutieff and Archbishop Kyrill Dritrieff to be appointed successor trustees. In addition, he requested authority to borrow money from the Buida trust to maintain or improve the property as needed, stated that the Trust was designed to put the same people in charge of both. The Court continued the matter to June 2, 2008 for notice to be given to Andrei Bowsunowski or to obtain a waiver. Mr. Glasser to verify the loan amount needed, to address the bond issue and to submit a supplemental declaration regarding the purpose of the Petition.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Guitron.
